message:
fix(config,core): improve Config::defaults expect message and saturating scan offset

1. config.rs:1134: Change bare .unwrap() to .expect() with message
   explaining the invariant (all Config fields must have defaults).
   This provides a clear diagnostic if a future field addition
   breaks the defaults path.

2. scan_pipeline.rs:365: Use saturating_add for offset + length
   check in pattern scanning overlap filter, consistent with
   defensive arithmetic used elsewhere in the pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
